---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a capability or improvement
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation

What use case does this address? What's currently painful or impossible?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. Concrete CLI shape, config field, or API surface
if you have one in mind.

## Alternatives considered

What workarounds exist today, and why they're insufficient.

## Scope

- Does this belong in the core pipeline (site-agnostic), in a SiteProfile,
  or in the evals/MCP layer?
- Any backward-compatibility impact?

## Additional context

Links to related issues, prior art in other tools, or relevant docs.
